title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. hypochoeroides
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. hypochoeroides, also known as Hawkweed or Little Hawkweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. hypochoeroides include its potential to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in some folk remedies for its supposed ability to treat a range of ailments.
